vendor: Vendor NPC (which NPC and zone varies by mount)
drop: Dungeon, raid, or world drop — check Wowhead for instance or boss
promotion: Limited promotion or bonus — often time-gated
petstore: Battle.net Shop or WoW in-game Shop
tcg: TCG or special redemption — verify current obtain path
discovery: Secret or hidden route — guides help narrow it down
default: See Wowhead spell link for where to obtain
